name: Fresh Porcini Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh porcinis, stemmed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan until hot but not smoking.
2. Add the mushrooms and garlic to the pan. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mushrooms are slightly wilted and lightly browned (about 3-4 minutes).
3. Pour in the white wine and increase the heat to high. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to simmer until the wine has reduced by half.
4. Add the diced tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Stir gently and bring the sauce back to a boil.
5. Continue cooking with occasional stirring until the sauce is slightly thicker (about 3-5 minutes).
